name: Edison Scientific
description: Full-stack AI scientist platform that autonomously generates hypotheses, designs experiments, analyzes data, and writes research reports. Spun out of FutureHouse with backing from Spark Capital.
approach: Multi-agent orchestration with world model for end-to-end scientific research
notes: Spun out from FutureHouse, Eric Schmidt-backed AI research nonprofit. Aims to automate the full scientific method.

name: Sakana AI
description: Japanese AI lab that published the landmark 'AI Scientist' paper demonstrating autonomous research paper generation. Raised over $520M at a $2.65B valuation.
approach: Nature-inspired AI; evolutionary and swarm-based model development
notes: Published 'The AI Scientist' (Aug 2024), first fully automated scientific paper generation system. Google strategic investment in Jan 2026.

name: Lila Sciences
description: Autonomous lab platform combining AI-driven experiment design with robotic execution. Flagship Pioneering portfolio company building closed-loop scientific discovery systems.
approach: Closed-loop AI + robotics for autonomous wet-lab experimentation
notes: Unveiled Mar 2025 with $200M seed — largest seed round for AI science startup at the time. Total $550M committed by Flagship.

name: Periodic Labs
description: Building autonomous laboratories where AI agents design, execute, and iterate on experiments without human intervention. Founded by ex-OpenAI and DeepMind researchers.
approach: AI-controlled robotic labs with foundation models for experimental science
notes: Record $300M seed round (Sep 2025). Focus on materials science and chemistry automation.

name: K-Dense (Biostate AI)
description: AI research agent platform (formerly Biostate AI) that helps scientists navigate literature, generate hypotheses, and analyze experimental data across biology and chemistry.
approach: LLM-powered research copilot with deep domain knowledge graphs
notes: Rebranded from Biostate AI to K-Dense. Focuses on knowledge-dense scientific reasoning.

name: Potato
description: AI research agent that automates literature review, data extraction, and synthesis for scientists. Focused on making research accessible and accelerating discovery.
approach: Automated research workflows with structured data extraction
notes: YC-backed. Focus on automating tedious parts of the research process.

name: Kepler AI
description: AI research agent building autonomous systems for scientific literature analysis, experimental planning, and research synthesis.
approach: Agentic AI for end-to-end research workflows
notes: Early-stage stealth company. Building AI agents for scientific research workflows.

name: Ascent Bio
description: Yale spinout applying AI to drug discovery, combining computational biology with novel target identification and lead optimization.
approach: AI-driven target identification and molecular design
notes: Academic spinout focused on AI-driven drug discovery from Yale computational biology lab.

name: Bio Protocol BIOS
description: Decentralized science (DeSci) platform using blockchain and AI agents to coordinate and fund open scientific research. BIOS is the AI agent layer for autonomous research.
approach: Blockchain-coordinated AI agents for decentralized scientific research
notes: Leading DeSci protocol. BIOS agents perform literature review and generate research reports autonomously.

name: SciSpace (Typeset)
description: AI-powered research platform for literature discovery, reading, and writing. Copilot helps researchers understand papers, extract data, and generate literature reviews.
approach: AI copilot for academic research with paper understanding and writing assistance
notes: Originally Typeset, rebranded to SciSpace. Over 5M researchers use the platform for literature review and paper writing.

name: FutureHouse
description: Nonprofit AI research organization backed by Eric Schmidt, building open-source AI tools for scientific research including PaperQA and other research automation systems.
approach: Open-source AI tools for literature search, synthesis, and scientific reasoning
notes: Parent org of Edison Scientific spinout. Built PaperQA, one of the most cited AI research tools. Eric Schmidt personally funded.

name: Recursion Pharmaceuticals
description: Public company (RXRX) combining AI, automation, and biology to industrialize drug discovery. Operates one of the largest biological datasets in the world with automated labs.
approach: High-throughput automated biology + AI models for drug discovery at scale
notes: Public (NASDAQ: RXRX). Acquired Cyclica and Valence Discovery. Partnership with NVIDIA for BioNeMo. Largest AI drug discovery company by market cap.
